# ContraVault AI - AI software for winning more tenders

> ContraVault AI helps Indian bidding teams find the right tenders, analyse tender documents faster, and prepare stronger bid submissions with less manual work.
> It is built for teams working on government and private tenders across EPC, infrastructure, engineering, industrial, and project-based businesses.

ContraVault AI is built for tendering, bid, contracts, proposal, commercial, and preconstruction teams in India.
It helps teams track relevant tender opportunities, shortlist tenders that fit their business, take faster Go/No-Go decisions, review tender documents with more clarity, and prepare submission-ready bid packages.
The platform supports tender shortlisting, eligibility checks, tender synopsis, contextual search, risk analysis, contradiction detection, pre-bid queries, tender form extraction, proposal drafting, and bid submission support.
Customer examples include: Bajel Projects, Tata Voltas, Shapoorji Pallonji, Bajaj Electricals, Ramky, Viswa Infra, Sopan, Rahee, Indus Projects, Paharpur Cooling Towers, Adani, Toyo Engineering, and thyssenkrupp.
Reported outcomes include faster tender review, lower manual effort, better bid readiness, and stronger decision-making, depending on team process and document complexity.

## Core

- [Home](https://www.contravault.com): Product overview and entry point for ContraVault AI.

## Platform Overview

ContraVault AI supports three core workflows for Indian bidding teams:

- **Find the Right Tender Fast**: Track relevant tender opportunities, find tenders that fit your business, and take quick Go/No-Go calls.
- **Analyse Tenders with Clarity**: Review tender documents faster, flag risks and contradictions, extract technical requirements, and get source-backed answers.
- **Prepare Bid Submissions Faster**: Auto-fill tender forms, prepare bid packages faster, and avoid missing forms, annexures, and certificates.

## Features

- [Go/No-Go Analyzer](https://www.contravault.com/features/go-no-go-analyzer): Compare internal standard-tender checks with tender requirements and take faster Go/No-Go decisions with page-level evidence.
- [AI Synopsis](https://www.contravault.com/features/ai-synopsis): Generate a structured tender synopsis covering scope, key requirements, timelines, eligibility points, and risk signals.
- [Contextual Search](https://www.contravault.com/features/contextual-search): Ask questions across the full tender pack and get source-backed answers linked to the exact clause or page.
- [Pre-bid Clarification](https://www.contravault.com/features/pre-bid): Identify ambiguities, gaps, and unclear requirements and draft pre-bid queries with source references.
- [Risk Analyzer](https://www.contravault.com/features/risk-analyzer): Detect commercial, legal, technical, and compliance risks across the full tender pack and prioritise them by severity.
- [Contradictions Flagger](https://www.contravault.com/features/ai-contradictions): Find conflicting clauses and mismatches across tender documents, annexures, schedules, forms, and corrigenda.
- [Live Tenders AI](https://www.contravault.com/): Track tender opportunities across portals like GeM, eProc, and every other Indian tender sources, then shortlist the ones that match your business and PQ criteria.
- [Forms AI](https://www.contravault.com/features/forms-ai): Extract and auto-fill tender forms, annexures, schedules, declarations, and supporting submission documents from the full tender pack using your company’s bid knowledge base.
- [Claims AI](https://www.contravault.com/features/claims): Organise claim-related letters, notices, emails, and contract records and draft stronger responses with proof.

- [Bid Submission](https://www.contravault.com/bid-submission): Auto-fill tender forms, organise attachments, and prepare submission-ready bid packages with less manual work.
- [AI Proposal Drafter](https://www.contravault.com/features/proposal-drafter): Draft proposal sections using tender requirements, past bids, and company knowledge.

## Research

- [ChatGPT vs ContraVault AI Whitepaper](https://www.contravault.com/whitepaper.md): In a controlled comparison of ContraVault AI and ChatGPT-5 across 110 construction tenders, 93.7% of ContraVault AI’s answers were found to be fully accurate and traceable. GPT, by contrast, showed signs of hallucination and misinformation even on a 120-page tender.

## Community

- [RFP Professionals Community](https://www.contravault.com/rfp-professionals): ContraVault's invite-only community of tendering and proposal professionals focused on best practices, peer learning, and practical discussions around bidding workflows.
